plugins.name: proxy-app-launcher
plugins.description: Create a macOS .app launcher that starts any Electron/desktop app with proxy environment variables injected

plugins.name: marketplace-contributor
plugins.description: Meta-plugin for contributing to this marketplace: author new skills, scaffold new plugins, and register them locally

plugins.name: parallel-orchestrator
plugins.description: Split a project into file-disjoint slices, dispatch parallel sub-agents into git worktrees via the Agent tool, merge cleanly — without copy-pasting prompts to other sessions

plugins.name: engineering-discipline
plugins.description: Set up and maintain a six-document source-of-truth system for any software project (strategic roadmap, immutable ADRs, feedback + improvements backlog, pre-implementation rubric, knowledge-points learning log, cross-linked changelog) — with an optional agent-evolution layer on top: an autonomous evolution loop (cron / /loop / /schedule) and a parent-driven sub-agent prompt (Agent tool), both built on a shared implementation core
